message:
fix: return ErrNotFound instead of nil,nil,nil in group bead lookups (gt-4p791p.3)

GetGroupBead, GetGroupByID, and LookupGroupByName returned (nil, nil, nil)
when a group was not found, forcing callers to check both value and error.
Now they return ErrNotFound consistently, following Go conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
